creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beech       2008-07-30 02:19:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/dovecot-managesieve Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                             pkg-message pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Fix the text in pkg-descr and pkg-message to be about mail/dovecot-managesieve
    and not the port it was copied from.
  - Fix PORTNAME so no version number is hardcoded and add DISTNAME to fetch the
    correct tarball.
  - Change the COMMENT to be more descriptive.
    Change RUN_DEPENDS to reference the installed ports and versions being depended on.
  - Fix CONFIGURE_ARGS to use ${MAKE} rather than hardcoding "make" and split to
    multiple lines for readability.
  
  PR:             ports/126059
  Submitted by:   Yarema <yds@CoolRat.org>
  Approved by:    portmgr, linimon (maintainer on vacation)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2       +11 -5     ports/mail/dovecot-managesieve/Makefile
  1.2       +1 -1      ports/mail/dovecot-managesieve/distinfo
  1.2       +5 -7      ports/mail/dovecot-managesieve/pkg-descr
  1.2       +12 -8     ports/mail/dovecot-managesieve/pkg-message
  1.2       +1 -1      ports/mail/dovecot-managesieve/pkg-plist
